Disorders of the kidneys, ureters, bladder and urethra are treated in both men and… Quality, Safety & Patient Experience Working together to ensure the delivery of high quality When it comes to maintaining my health, I'm diligent about getting my annual physical exam, and this truly saved my life. In March 2009, I went for my annual physical exam which includes a test for PSA [prostate-specific antigen, a marker for prostate cancer]. My PSA results for the previous year were high normal, and in this recent examination my numbers were up again—so my primary-care doctor referred me to a urologist, Dr.Jayesh Dhabalia, to get it checked out.
